title: Department Manager Vacancy at Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd!
